content.query:
CREATE VIEW     v_M3_LandedCost
-- drop view v_M3_LandedCost
as
SELECT          A.*
,               [Total Weight]*1.0/NULLIF((SUM([Total Weight]) OVER (PARTITION BY [Container Number])),0) AS [Weight Pct]
,               [Total Weight]*1.0/NULLIF((SUM([Total Weight]) OVER (PARTITION BY [Container Number])),0)*1.0*(SUM([Freight Cost]) OVER (PARTITION BY [Container Number])) AS [Freight Calc]
,               [Total Weight]*1.0/NULLIF((SUM([Total Weight]) OVER (PARTITION BY [Container Number])),0)*1.0*(SUM([Freight Cost]) OVER (PARTITION BY [Container Number])) - [Freight Cost] as [Freight Diff] 
FROM            
(
SELECT          POH.PUNO AS [PO Number]
,               POL.PNLI AS [PO Line]
,               POL.PUSL AS [Line Status]
,               POL.ORCO AS [Country of Origin]
,               POL.WHLO AS [Warehouse]
,               LEFT(CAST(CAST(POL.DWDT as VARCHAR(8)) AS DATE), 10) AS [Expected Delivery Date]
,               POL.SUDO AS [Container Number]
,               ITM.ITNO AS [Item Number]
,               ITM.ITDS AS [Item Description]
,               CST.TX40 AS [Category]
,               SUM(ORQA) as [Order Qty]
,               MAX(POL.PUPR) as [FOB CPU]
,               ISNULL(MAX(PCL.[Landed Cost]),0)*1.0/NULLIF(SUM(ORQA),0) as [Landed CPU]
,               MAX(POL.PUPR) + ISNULL(MAX(PCL.[Landed Cost]),0)*1.0/NULLIF(SUM(ORQA),0) AS [Total CPU]
,               (ISNULL(MAX(PCL.[Line Haul]),0) + ISNULL(MAX([Final Mile]),0) + ISNULL(MAX([Acc & Oth]),0))/NULLIF(SUM(ORQA),0)*1.0 AS [Freight CPU]
,               MAX([Trump Tariff])*1.0/NULLIF(SUM(ORQA),0) AS [Trump CPU]
,               ISNULL(MAX(PCL.[Line Haul]),0)*1.0/NULLIF(SUM(ORQA),0) as [Line Haul CPU]
,               MAX([PMI Cost])*1.0/NULLIF(SUM(ORQA),0) AS [PMI CPU]
,               SUM(ORQA*POL.PUPR) as [FOB Cost]
,               ISNULL(MAX(PCL.[Landed Cost]),0) AS [Landed Cost]
,               SUM(ORQA*POL.PUPR) + ISNULL(MAX(PCL.[Landed Cost]),0) as [Total Cost]
,               ISNULL(MAX(PCL.[Line Haul]),0) AS [Line Haul]
,               ISNULL(MAX([Final Mile]),0) AS [Final Mile]
,               ISNULL(MAX([Acc & Oth]),0) AS [Acc & Oth]
,               ISNULL(MAX(PCL.[Line Haul]),0) + ISNULL(MAX([Final Mile]),0) + ISNULL(MAX([Acc & Oth]),0) as [Freight Cost]
,               MAX(ITM.GRWE) as [Unit Gross Weight]
,               MAX(ITM.GRWE)*SUM(ORQA) as [Total Weight]
,               POL.CSNO AS [HTS Code]
,               ITM.CFI4 AS [Trump Amt]
,               MAX([Trump Tariff]) AS [Trump Tariff]
,               MAX([Trump Tariff])*1.0/NULLIF(SUM(ORQA*POL.PUPR),0) AS [Trump Calc Rate]
,               MAX([PMI Cost]) AS [PMI Cost]
,               MAX([PMI Cost])*1.0/NULLIF(SUM(ORQA*POL.PUPR),0) AS [PMI Rate]
FROM            M3_MPHEAD POH
JOIN            M3_MPLINE POL ON POH.PUNO = POL.PUNO
JOIN            M3_MITMAS ITM ON POL.ITNO = ITM.ITNO
JOIN            M3_CSYTAB CST ON ITM.ITGR = CST.STKY
LEFT JOIN      (
                SELECT          PUNO
,                               PNLI
,                               MAX(CASE WHEN CEID = 'DUTY' then RCAC end) as [Duty Rate]
,                               MAX(CASE WHEN CEID = 'CREDIT' then RCAC end) as [Credit]
,                               MAX(CASE WHEN CEID = 'PMI' then RCAC end) as [PMI Cost]
,                               MAX(CASE WHEN CEID = 'TRUTAR' then RCAC end) as [Trump Tariff]
,                               MAX(CASE WHEN CEID = 'FREI01' then RCAC end) as [Line Haul]
,                               MAX(CASE WHEN CEID = 'FREI02' then RCAC end) as [Final Mile]
,                               MAX(CASE WHEN CEID = 'FREI03' then RCAC end) as [Acc & Oth]
,                               SUM(RCAC) AS [Landed Cost]
                FROM            M3_FGRPCL
                GROUP BY        PUNO, PNLI
                ) PCL ON POH.PUNO = PCL.PUNO AND POL.PNLI = PCL.PNLI
WHERE           1=1
--AND             POL.SUDO = 'EITU1821405'
GROUP BY        POH.PUNO, POL.PNLI, POL.ORCO, POL.WHLO, POL.DWDT, POL.SUDO, ITM.ITNO, ITM.ITDS, CST.TX40, POL.PUPR, POL.CSNO, ITM.CFI4, POL.PUSL
) A
